description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

【This survey has ended】Market Sounding Survey for Privatization of Asama Childcare Center Rebuilding

As part of rebuilding Asama Childcare Center, we conducted a market sounding survey to gather opinions and proposals from private operators regarding facility construction and operation.

• Entry sheet submission period: November 19, 2025 (Wednesday) to December 5, 2025 (Friday)
• Pre-submission questions period: November 19, 2025 (Wednesday) to December 5, 2025 (Friday)

The results were published on February 18, 2026 (Reiwa 8). Implementation guidelines, forms, and answers to pre-submission questions are also available.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kodomoshienbu/kodomoseisakuka/12596.html
summary: ℹ️ 【Ended】Market Sounding Survey for Municipal Childcare Facilities
